name: rchilli-mcp-hub
description: RChilli HR Intelligence MCP — parse resumes and job descriptions, match candidates, enrich skills with ONet/ESCO taxonomy, redact bias fields, and convert documents through any MCP-enabled AI assistant.

tools.name: parse_resume
tools.description: Extracts 200+ normalized fields from resume text

tools.name: parse_resume_from_url
tools.description: Parses a resume from a public URL

tools.name: parse_job_description
tools.description: Parses a job description into structured role data

tools.name: lookup_skill
tools.description: Returns authoritative detail for any skill from ONet/ESCO taxonomy

tools.name: lookup_job_profile
tools.description: Returns canonical detail for any job profile or title

tools.name: autocomplete_skill
tools.description: Returns skill name suggestions for a partial keyword

tools.name: autocomplete_job_profile
tools.description: Returns job profile suggestions for a partial keyword

tools.name: redact_resume
tools.description: Removes bias and PII fields from a resume

tools.name: reformat_resume_with_template
tools.description: Restyles a resume into a branded template

tools.name: convert_document_format
tools.description: Converts a resume document between formats

tools.name: extract_named_entities
tools.description: Tags named entities from any HR text

tools.name: extract_contact_info
tools.description: Extracts contact details from unstructured text

tools.name: geocode_locations
tools.description: Resolves latitude and longitude for locations

tools.name: determine_job_zone
tools.description: Determines O*NET Job Zone level for a resume or JD

tools.name: score_resume_against_jd
tools.description: Produces an explainable fit score between a resume and a JD

tools.name: find_matches_in_index
tools.description: Ranks an indexed talent pool against a source document

tools.name: search_indexed_documents
tools.description: Keyword search across indexed resumes or JDs
